title: Animal Garden - White Rhinoceros
description: This mod adds the White Rhino to the game to bring more life to the savanna biomes.
body:
This mod adds the White Rhino to the game to bring more life to the savanna biomes.

 

If they are damaged they will get aggressive instantly or when there is a baby rhino nearby.

They will first charge at their target damaging and pushing entities up into the air.

After it finished its charge attack it will run slower.

 

They are hard to tame it, with a 10% chance every time you give it food.
And if its tamed it will not follow you and you cant make it sit down,
but if you are near to it, it will be aggressive towards the attacker of the owner except the children.

 

Females are smaller then males and only male and female can breed.


The food item has an item tag json file that can be found in the data->tags->item.
Currently only the wheat is added to that list.

 

When they eat grass from the ground they will restore their hp a bit.
Females(75) are smaller and have less hp then males(100) and children have even more less hp(25).

 

Their horns grow randomly and the longer it is the higher their damage is with a max of 12 damage.
They can also drop leathers and bones.

 

You can find them in the savanna biomes.

(In forge and neoforge you can change the spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack and in fabric there is a config file for it)

 

Mod currently supports

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
